response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video structure: 00:00-02:00 is a stream/chat intro sequence, and 02:00-05:00 is a vocal performance. 2. Identified the song title ('ちょこせんせーしょん', 'Choco-sensation') and composer ('柊マグネタイト', 'Hiiragi Magnetite') from on-screen text during the vocal performance. The performer is the VTuber Yuzuki Choco. 3. Performed multiple searches for the song's lyrics using the Japanese title, composer, and performer name. No official or full lyrics were found in the search results, as it is an original song for the VTuber. Therefore, the lyrics fields are set to null.
response.global_summary: The video is an introductory stream and live performance by the VTuber Yuzuki Choco on her birthday (生誕祭). It starts with a chat sequence and proceeds to a full vocal performance of her original song 'Choco-sensation'.

scenes.description: A static, chibi-style animation featuring the VTuber Yuzuki Choco with a cat character, representing a stream intro sequence. No vocal music performance takes place.

A 3D stage performance of the song 'Choco-sensation'. The VTuber Yuzuki Choco performs the song while dancing. The on-screen text identifies the song as 'ちょこせんせーしょん' (Choco-sensation) and the composer as '柊マグネタイト' (Hiiragi Magnetite).
